title: cristaria viridiluteola var. geraniifolia
intro: Cristaria viridiluteola var. geraniifolia, also known as the Geranium Leaf Lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Nymphaeaceae, specifically a variant of the Cristaria viridiluteola species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. The health benefits of Cristaria viridiluteola var. geraniifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
